nodes.label: AI as creative assistant preserving human authorship
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous creator replacing human
nodes.grounding_span: I did not want AI writing the book for me. I only wanted it as an assistant.

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy in factual tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I found I had to be careful, because it wasn't always correct

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for business tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as inefficient or overcomplicated for business
nodes.grounding_span: For my direct sales business the more it can do for me the better.

nodes.label: AI instruction following in graphic generation
nodes.label_negative: AI failure to follow instructions in graphics
nodes.grounding_span: Most AIs don't follow the instructions as well as they should

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming partner enhancing ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful or stifling in brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I feel satisfied when AI brainstorms with me and takes an idea I had and makes it even better.

nodes.label: Creative integrity and human artistry
nodes.grounding_span: When the humanity is taken out of art it ceases to be art.

nodes.label: Accuracy and truthfulness
nodes.grounding_span: I found I had to be careful, because it wasn't always correct

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and idea enhancement
nodes.grounding_span: takes an idea I had and makes it even better

nodes.label: Firm resistance to AI writing the novel
nodes.grounding_span: I did not want AI writing the book for me.

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for historical accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I found I had to be careful, because it wasn't always correct

nodes.label: Enthusiasm for AI automation in business
nodes.grounding_span: For my direct sales business the more it can do for me the better.

nodes.label: Frustration with AI in graphic generation
nodes.grounding_span: My frustrations usually occur when it comes to asking for graphics.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as brainstorming partner
nodes.grounding_span: I feel satisfied when AI brainstorms with me

nodes.label: Domain-dependent delegation — different AI roles for creative vs. business tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For the novel is was an assistant while I did the work. For my direct sales business the more it can do for me the better.

nodes.label: Iterative verification — double-checking AI outputs for accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I found I had to be careful, because it wasn't always correct and I found myself needing to double check things
